vault.title: AI Session Vault
vault.description: Back up, verify, and safely restore local AI coding sessions without modifying active application data.
vault.placeholders.sourceRoot: Use the application's default storage path
vault.restore.title: Isolated native recovery
vault.restore.unsupported: The selected application does not support native restore
vault.task.title: Task and report
vault.errors.restoreUnsupported: The selected application does not support native restore
vault.errors.sessionRequired: Enter the native session ID for a single-session restore
vault.confirm.sync: Start a real incremental backup? Active application data will remain read-only.
vault.confirm.restore: Create an isolated recovery directory? The destination must not already exist.
vault.confirm.closeActive: A Vault task is still running. Cancel it and close?
